title: sorbus praemorsa
intro: Sorbus praemorsa, also known as the Round-leaved Whitebeam, is a deciduous tree species native to the mountains of southern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sorbus praemorsa include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Sorbus praemorsa is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and its herbal preparations are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
